infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Service Markaz uses your location to find nearby service providers.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Service Markaz uses your location to find nearby service providers.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Service Markaz needs camera access to upload your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Service Markaz needs photo library access to upload images.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Service Markaz to use your location to find nearby service providers.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Service Markaz to access your photos to upload profile images.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Service Markaz to use the camera to take profile photos.
